builders.subgoal: Wire input change stream to renderer to output/error regions; route success/failure correctly.

verification_summary: app.js subscribes to onLatexChange, calls renderer.render, routes ok=true to output region, ok=false to error region (with stale marker on output). No button. S3.A1, S3.A2 are exercised by user-flow tests; S3.A5 is satisfied by the dedicated [data-role='latex-error'] region in the shell.
